title: To The Center of The Galaxy
description: Welcome to the great wide galaxy! Explore the vast worlds, use high-tech machines to automate processes, and get weapons that match the ages.
body:
# To The Center of The Galaxy!
Welcome to this immersive experience where you can explore the world with high-tech mods. The biggest and most important mods are Ad Astra, Mekanism, Create, and Just Enough Guns. But that is not the only thing that this pack brings to the game. There are more features waiting to be discovered by explorers like you! Explore the galaxy, defend against foes, and build to your heart's content. Automate processes, and build nuclear reactors. 

**NOTES**
This mod is recommended to also have the Physics Mod Pro. This mod is available at [https://minecraftphysicsmod.com/pro](https://minecraftphysicsmod.com/pro), and is completely free! Make sure that you have this mod for the full experience.
